scripts.dev: npm run build -w @chat-app/shared && concurrently "npm run dev -w @chat-app/shared" "npm run dev -w @chat-app/api" "npm run dev -w @chat-app/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @chat-app/shared && npm run build -w @chat-app/api && npm run build -w @chat-app/web
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w @chat-app/shared && npm run lint -w @chat-app/api && npm run lint -w @chat-app/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @chat-app/shared && npm run typecheck -w @chat-app/api && npm run typecheck -w @chat-app/web
